SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-14-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-14-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF NANCY CHIRINOS, MFT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAISER PERMANENTE INSURANCE IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS REGINALD THOMPSON. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIRINOS, MFT, NANCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAISER PERMANENTE INSURANCE $11,168.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,243.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
